info.title: Syntropic137 API
info.description: API for Syntropic137. Provides real-time observability for workflow execution, agent sessions, and artifacts.

get.description: List all workflow templates.
Get workflow details by ID (supports partial ID prefix matching).

delete.description:
Archive (soft-delete) a workflow template.

Archived templates are excluded from listing by default but remain
accessible via `GET /workflows/{id}` and with `?include_archived=true`.

409.description: Conflict — workflow has active executions or is already archived

get.description: Export a workflow as a distributable package or Claude Code plugin.

parameters.name: format

schema.description: Export format: 'package' (workflow.yaml + phases) or 'plugin' (full CC plugin)
schema.title: Format

parameters.description: Export format: 'package' (workflow.yaml + phases) or 'plugin' (full CC plugin)

get.description: List all execution runs for a workflow.
DEPRECATED: Use /workflows/{workflow_id}/runs instead.

put.description: Update a workflow phase's prompt template and optional config.

get.description: List all workflow executions across all workflows.
Get detailed information about a workflow execution run (supports partial ID prefix matching).
Get the status of a workflow execution.
List all active (non-completed) executions.

schema.title: Response List Active Executions Endpoint Workflows Executions Active Get

post.description: Cancel a running or paused execution.
Inject a message into the execution context.

get.description: Get current execution state.
List agent sessions with optional filtering.
Get session details by ID (supports partial ID prefix matching).
List artifacts with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Artifacts Endpoint Artifacts Get

get.description: Get artifact details by ID (supports partial ID prefix matching).
Get artifact content only (for large artifacts).

post.description: Upload binary content for an existing artifact (max 50 MB).

get.description: Get aggregated metrics across all workflows or for a specific workflow.
Get tool execution timeline for a session.
Get token usage metrics for a session.
List session costs with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Session Costs Endpoint Costs Sessions Get

get.description: Get cost for a specific session.
List execution costs.

schema.title: Response List Execution Costs Endpoint Costs Executions Get

get.description: Get aggregated cost for a workflow execution.
Get summary of all costs across sessions and executions.
Get recent activity events for the global dashboard feed.
Get all events for a session.
Get a timeline view of session events.

schema.title: Response Get Session Timeline Endpoint Events Sessions  Session Id  Timeline Get

get.description: Get cost summary for a session.
Get tool usage summary for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Session Tools Endpoint Events Sessions  Session Id  Tools Get

get.description:
List repositories accessible to the GitHub App.

Makes a live query to the GitHub API. If no installation_id is provided,
queries all active installations and aggregates the results.
Get conversation log for a session.
Get conversation metadata for a session.
List all trigger rules.
Get all trigger activity (global).
Get trigger details.
Get execution history for a trigger.

post.description: Enable a preset for a repository.

schema.title: Response Github Webhook Endpoint Webhooks Github Post

get.description:
Stream domain events for a single execution.

Sends a ``connected`` handshake frame on connect, then forwards every
domain event emitted by the RealTimeProjection for this execution.
Closes automatically when a terminal event (WorkflowCompleted /
WorkflowFailed) is broadcast, or when the client disconnects.

Stream the global activity feed (git events, system-wide activity).

Runs indefinitely until the client disconnects.  There is no terminal
sentinel for the activity channel, it never completes.

Health check for the SSE subsystem.

Returns active subscriber and execution counts from the RealTimeProjection.
List all organizations.
Get organization details.
List systems with optional organization filter.
Get system details.
Get cross-repo health overview for a system.
Get cost breakdown for a system.
Get execution timeline for a system.
Get recurring failure and cost patterns for a system.
Get historical execution timeline for a system.
List repos with optional filters.
Get repo details.

put.description: Update mutable fields of a repo.

post.description: Assign a repo to a system.
Unassign a repo from its system.

get.description: Get health snapshot for a repo.
Get cost breakdown for a repo.
Get execution timeline for a repo.
Get recent failures for a repo.
Get agent sessions for a repo.
Get global overview of all systems and repos.
Get global cost breakdown, optionally filtered by system.
Get daily contribution heatmap data.
Root endpoint with API info.
Health check endpoint with detailed subscription status.

AssignRepoToSystemRequest.description: Request body for assigning a repo to a system.

repos.title: Repos
repos.description: Default GitHub URLs for this workflow template (ADR-058). Can be overridden at execution time via the repos field on the execute request.

task.title: Task
task.description: Primary task description -- substituted for $ARGUMENTS in phase prompts.

repos.title: Repos
repos.description: GitHub URLs to pre-clone for workspace hydration (ADR-058). Overrides the workflow template's repository_url. Equivalent to passing inputs={'repos': 'url1,url2'} but type-safe.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Agent provider to use. Currently ignored by execute(); sending this field has no effect.

max_budget_usd.title: Max Budget Usd
max_budget_usd.description: Maximum budget in USD. Currently ignored by execute(); sending this field has no effect.

ExecutionCostResponse.title: ExecutionCostResponse
ExecutionCostResponse.description: Aggregated cost for a workflow execution.

ExportManifestResponse.title: ExportManifestResponse
ExportManifestResponse.description:
Structured export of a workflow as a file manifest.

Each key in ``files`` is a relative path; each value is the file content.
The CLI writes these to disk to produce an installable package or plugin.

FailurePatternResponse.title: FailurePatternResponse
FailurePatternResponse.description: A recurring failure pattern within a system.

GlobalOverviewResponse.title: GlobalOverviewResponse
GlobalOverviewResponse.description: Global overview of all systems and repos.

RepoHealthResponse.title: RepoHealthResponse
RepoHealthResponse.description:
Per-repo health snapshot with success rate, trend, and accumulated costs.

Note: ``recent_cost_usd`` is accumulated from WorkflowCompleted/Failed events
since the projection was last reset — it is not a fixed time window and may
differ from ``RepoCostResponse.total_cost_usd`` which is a TimescaleDB total.
